name: BaseSelect
description:
Defines specific behavior for Input controls which deals with list of values including:
 - Select
 - RadioGroup
 - CheckboxGroup
 - ComboBox
 ...

inputs.name: appendTo
inputs.description: The element to which the popover should be appended.

inputs.name: autoResize
inputs.description: Turns on/off Adjustable Width feature

inputs.name: closeOnOutsideClick
inputs.description: Whether close the popover on outside click.

inputs.name: controlTemplate
inputs.description: Custom template used to build control body.

inputs.name: fillControlMode
inputs.description:
Preset options for the select body width.
* `at-least` will apply a minimum width to the body equivalent to the width of the control.
* `equal` will apply a width to the body equivalent to the width of the control.
* Leave blank for no effect.

inputs.name: glyph
inputs.description: Glyph to add icon in the select component.

inputs.name: glyphFont
inputs.description: Glyph font family

inputs.name: group
inputs.description: Tells the select if we need to group items

inputs.name: groupKey
inputs.description: A field name to use to group data by (support dotted notation)

inputs.name: maxHeight
inputs.description: Provides maximum default height for the optionPanel

inputs.name: maxWidth
inputs.description: Max width of list container

inputs.name: minWidth
inputs.description: Min width of list container

inputs.name: mobile
inputs.description: Whether the select should be built on mobile mode

inputs.name: mobileConfig
inputs.description: Select Input Mobile Configuration

inputs.name: noValueLabel
inputs.description:
String rendered as first value in the popup which let the user to make 'no selection' from
available list of values. When this option is active and use make this selection we save a
NULL value

inputs.name: noWrapText
inputs.description: Whether not to wrap text

inputs.name: readonly
inputs.description: Whether the select component is readonly.

inputs.name: secondaryKey
inputs.description: The field to show data in secondary column

inputs.name: secondaryTextAlignment
inputs.description: Horizontally align text inside the second column (Applicable for two columns layout)

inputs.name: showSecondaryText
inputs.description: Show the second column (Applicable for two columns layout)

inputs.name: tabOutStrategy
inputs.description:
Action to perform when user shifts focus from the dropdown.
- `close` will close the dropdown preserving previously selected value.
- `closeAndSelect` will close the dropdown and select last focused dropdown item.

inputs.name: triggerValue
inputs.description: Trigger value

outputs.name: selectionChange
outputs.description: Event emitted when item is selected.

methods.name: focus
methods.description:
In most of the cases when working with input element directly you should be just find to assing
variable to this element

```
<input #inputElementRef fd-form-control ...>
```

and this default behavior used. For other cases implement focus.

methods.name: onContainerClick
methods.description:
Handles even when we click on parent container which is the FormField Wrapping this
control
